intended_use: A bioimpedance spectroscopy device for use on adult human patients, utilizing impedance ratios that are displayed as an L-Dex ratio that supports the measurement of extracellular fluid volume differen
intended_use_full: A bioimpedance spectroscopy device for use on adult human patients, utilizing impedance ratios that are displayed as an L-Dex ratio that supports the measurement of extracellular fluid volume differences between the limbs and is presented to the clinician on an L-Dex scale as an aid to their clinical assessment of unilateral lymphedema of the arm and leg in women and the leg in men. The device is only indicated for patients who will have or who have had lymph nodes, from the axillary and pelvic regions, either removed, damaged or irradiated.
target_condition: unilateral lymphedema of the arm and leg in women and the leg in men
ground_truth: Test fixture with multiple fixed impedance loads representing different humans; comparison to cleared predicate device (ImpediMed L-Dex U400)
other_metrics: Correlation coefficient (r > 0.99) comparing SOZO system L-Dex readings to predicate U400 device using test fixture with multiple fixed impedance loads
